Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Don't worry about them. They're just waiting in their own areas.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}You see the big door up ahead?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}There's an arena through there. That's where we'll be fighting them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}And these are real battles. There will be a price for losing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}It seems so. The others didn't appear willing to back down, anyway.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}But even if you refuse to fight... I won't let them take your key.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 2 54 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}You promised me that you wouldn't hurt my friends![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I know... But your life might be on the line here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Your key and your new power are both deeply connected to your heart.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}So if your key is taken... I think your life could be at risk.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}The other person with the same power as you died, didn't he!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 2 25 25}I'll... I'll protect my sister, whatever it takes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}You know... This is actually where I woke up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I'd been wondering what this place is... But now, I have this feeling...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}It's hard to explain, but... I think this is what I was meant to do all along.[n]{f 1 1}
